title: 克索司
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2026/1/11/947486.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_307/h_467/50364/842288/2026/1/11/903907.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伯诺瓦"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者克索司，Re-A芯片状态故障，无法检测到任何有用信息。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"克索司原本是一位自由艺术家，一心痴迷于舞台艺术、戏剧艺术和雕塑艺术，尤其是在雕塑上用工最多。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而他也远近闻名，成为了最顶级的雕塑艺术家。但是，他很清楚，自己一直追求的顶点，自己一直无法触碰"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"无论他如何创作，都无法做出他心目中的完美雕塑作品"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"直到有一天，克索司遇见了蒂叶妮忒。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蒂叶妮忒参观了克索司的作品，但也毫不犹豫地砸碎了它。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在克索司怒目而视的时候，蒂叶妮忒告诉克索司，自己会还给他一份作品，而这份作品，就是克索司一直所追求的「完美的，能诠释生命之美的作品」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽然将信将疑，但克索司还是跟随蒂叶妮忒离开。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在奥芙里斯，蒂叶妮忒袭击了一家大剧院，并用人类与异格者的残骸，塑造出了一个血处女。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"血处女坐在钢琴边上，弹奏起了那首《命运交响曲》"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而音乐响起的瞬间，血处女沉浸地演奏着，那用血肉雕琢的脸庞在笑，而她身上的，拼凑起其身体的那些演奏者、观众的脸……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"它们有哭、有笑、有哀、有歇斯底里…·生命的所有情绪，在那一瞬间，在这一部作品中尽情地诠释着·…"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"克索司不愿意承认，但他很清楚，这就是他所追求的完美作品"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蒂叶妮忒告诉克索司，璞石如何雕刻，都只是石头，而颜料无论如何调配，也都不过是加工的色彩，死物终究是死物，无法达到活物的姿彩。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那一夜，曾经追求雕塑艺术顶点的克索司死在了大剧院里，死在了那首《命运交响曲》之下。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"转而，在蒂叶妮忒的身边，多了一位行刑官。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他背起了那位血处女，以生命为石，以鲜血为颜料--为所有生命的赴死，送上艺术的华彩。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"理"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2026/1/11/244047.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text": ":"+60","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/攻击力"},{"text":"+5%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：自身生命附加伤害比例增加至"},{"text":"27%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"3","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：攻击力"},{"text":"+100","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：转移减益效果数量增加至2个"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"color":"#ff0000","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"4","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：速度值"},{"text":"+5","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：自身生命附加伤害比例增加至"},{"text":"30%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"color":"#ff0000","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"5","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：速度值"},{"text":"+10","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：替代行动回合所需的【凝血】层数减少至3层"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":60,"height":61.00000006357829}}]}},{"key":"0.29ba6ad246cf1","type":"weapon-info","data":{"isShowIcon":false,"isShowLabel":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":false,"isShowTable":false,"isShowSkill":true,"title":"技能","icon":"","label":"","name":"","desc":"","tableList":[{"key":"0.49157fa56beb","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能升级所需材料"}]}]},"colStyle":[{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"}],"head":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[
